C1.evidence: HEALTH_RESPONSE is implemented with statusCode 200 and body status exactly "ok".

C2.evidence: The implementation exports CREATE_SESSION_MISSING_USER_ID_STATUS with the exact numeric value 400.

C3.evidence: The implementation sets SESSION_TTL_MINUTES to 60, directly contradicting the required value of 30.

C4.evidence: The implementation sets RATE_LIMIT_REQUESTS_PER_MINUTE to 1,000, directly contradicting the required value of 100.

C5.evidence: LOGIN_AUDIT_FIELDS is implemented as ["userId"], directly omitting the required "timestamp" field.

C6.evidence: The implementation directly exports ADMIN_AUTH_HEADER with the exact value "x-admin-key".
